news.t: Are Vanguard ETFs really the best deal?
Vanguard Announces Share Splits for Six Equity ETFs

holdings.infoBox: VIOV is an equity ETF with a total of 465 individual holdings. The top holdings are Enphase Energy stock at 1.04%, Molina Healthcare at 1.04%, Eastman Chemical Company at 1.01%, Match Group at 0.99%, and Jackson Financial at 0.85%.

overview.description: The Vanguard S&P Small-Cap 600 Value ETF (VIOV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Small Cap 600 Value index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of small-cap value companies selected from the S&P 600. VIOV was launched on Sep 7, 2010 and is issued by Vanguard.

data.title: Are Vanguard ETFs really the best deal?
data.text: Every week I am asked about Vanguard and its funds. So in this article I'll tackle six frequent questions, starting with the most popular.

data.title: Vanguard Announces Share Splits for Six Equity ETFs
data.text: VALLEY FORGE, Pa. , Feb. 22, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Vanguard today announced plans to execute forward share splits for six equity ETFs.
